features: NOSTALGIC FRAGRANCE: A classic fragrance reminiscent of sensuous rose, fragrant cumin and comforting lavendar
VITAMIN E: Enriched with Vitamin E for a soothing experience on sensitive skin
RICH CREAMY LATHER: This bar soap produced a rich, creamy, luxurious lather whilst cleaning and caring for your hands
BULK BUY: Available in a bulk buy of 32 bars, this is the perfect solution for all of the family
description: Product Description The original classic ivory bar soap, trusted for generations. Famed for its classic, luxury fragrance, Imperial Leather Original bar soap wraps you in a rich, creamy lather, cleaning and caring for all the family. The Original bar soap that's long lasting, trusted by generation after generation. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Sodium Chloride, Limonene, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, CI 42090, CI 14700 Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
